title: Launch HN: Chamber (YC W26) – An AI Teammate for GPU Infrastructure
full_text:
Meet Chambie, your AIOps teammate

Setting up GPU infrastructure across clouds, creating training jobs, and fixing or optimizing them shouldn't be hard.

That's why we built Chambie, your all-in-one AIOps teammate to accelerate ML team velocity. No more infra setup, no more missed failures. Chambie handles everything automatically.
